function.name: write_file

args.content:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Token:
    kind: str
    value: object
    line: int
    col: int

args.command: python -c 'from tinylang.lexer import tokenize; print(tokenize("let x = 1 + 2;"))'
